name: Chase Sapphire Preferred® Card

welcome_offer.description: 75,000 bonus points after you spend $5,000 on purchases in the first 3 months from account opening.

earning_rates.notes: On travel purchased through Chase Travel (hotels, car rentals, flights).
Including takeout and eligible delivery services.
Excludes Target, Walmart, and wholesale clubs.

annual_credits.name: Chase Travel Hotel Credit
annual_credits.description: $50 annual credit on hotel stays purchased through Chase Travel.

other_benefits.name: Anniversary Point Bonus
other_benefits.description: 10% of total spend in pts on each account anniversary.

other_benefits.name: Points Transfer
other_benefits.description: Transfer points to leading airline and hotel frequent travel programs at 1 to 1 value.

notes: Excellent mid-tier travel card with strong transfer partners and primary rental insurance.
